summary: Delete UI gating and delete flows were added for backend-owned posts and draft items, and backend authorization checks were implemented. However, permanent deletion of the associated backend audio blob is not evidenced, and the frontend does not clearly surface the required English error message when a non-author attempts backend deletion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deleting a published backend upload permanently removes the post and its associated stored audio blob (so it is no longer retrievable via backend blob access).
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo removes the post from the audioPosts map and userContent list, but the diff shows no call to delete/remove the underlying stored audio blob from blob storage / ExternalBlob; therefore permanence for the stored audio data is not demonstrated.

missing_requirements.requirement: If a non-author still attempts deletion (e.g., via manual calls), the UI shows an English error message indicating the user can only delete their own posts.
missing_requirements.reason: AudioCard.handleDelete() catches errors but only shows a toast error for draft deletion failures; there is no shown English toast/error path for backend deletion failures (including authorization failures).

hallucinated_features.description: Language-specific empty state detection/messaging on the feed page (separate message when language filters yield zero items).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest explicitly says not to change unrelated UI/behavior beyond adding/fixing delete-upload option.

hallucinated_features.description: Draft item change subscription/notification system (subscribeToDraftChanges, notifyDraftChange) to reactively reload drafts from localStorage.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 requires draft deletion from localStorage, but a subscription system for draft changes is additional behavior not explicitly requested.
